shadow_dancer.name: Shadow Dancer
shadow_dancer.description: A prestige rogue who weaves through the battlefield using void-steps.

engine_passive.name: Void Waltz
engine_passive.description: Every [utility] tagged blessing used grants a temporary stack of Evasion.

warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.description: A master of all weapons who controls the flow of melee combat.

engine_passive.name: Combat Flow
engine_passive.description: Using a [strike] blessing reduces the tick cooldown of your next [disruption] blessing by 1.

dancer.name: Dancer
dancer.description: A rhythmic combatant who combines offensive buffs with disruptive effects.

engine_passive.name: Rhythmic Step
engine_passive.description: Moving and attacking in the same heartbeat increases your speed resonance by 2.

gambler.name: Gambler
gambler.description: Thrives on risk and reward, using high-resonance lethality to create advantages.

engine_passive.name: Loaded Dice
engine_passive.description: Your [lethal] flavor scaling has a 10% chance to triple its multiplier on every hit.

magician.name: Magician
magician.description: A control-based caster specializing in disruption and telekinesis.

engine_passive.name: Sleight of Hand
engine_passive.description: [disruption] tagged blessings have their range increased by 2 rooms.

puppet_master.name: Puppet Master
puppet_master.description: Summons controllable constructs that follow commands.

engine_passive.name: String Puller
engine_passive.description: Your constructs inherit 50% of your total Protection resonance.

summoner.name: Summoner
summoner.description: Controls powerful but costly legendary creatures.

engine_passive.name: Primal Bond
engine_passive.description: Summoned entities deal 1% bonus damage per point of Instinct resonance.
